text:
11 MCP servers: 27,462 tokens before a single user message.

GitHub alone: 20,444 tokens.

typed your first question yet? no. you've already spent 21% of a 128K context window.

typical agent setup: github + slack + notion + 2 custom servers.

~29K tokens before message 1.

at $0.003/1K tokens: $0.09/conversation. 1,000 conversations/day: $2,700/month. on tool definitions.

postgres MCP: 33 tokens for 1 tool.

github MCP: 20,444 tokens for 80 tools.

if every server built like postgres, 11 servers would cost ~400 tokens total instead of 27,000.
